# LinkNote - llms.txt

# About
LinkNote is a privacy-first, client-side-only Markdown editor where content lives in the URL.
Everything runs in the browser with zero server interaction.

# Tech Stack
- Frontend: Vanilla JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3
- Dependencies: marked.js (Markdown parsing), DOMPurify (XSS protection)
- Build: Vite, Node.js, npm
- Architecture: 5 modular components (URLCodec, MarkdownEngine, EditorManager, ThemeManager, UIController)

# Key Features
- Client-side only (no backend, no database, no API)
- URL-based storage (content encoded in URL fragment)
- Real-time Markdown preview
- Light/dark theme support
- Privacy by design (no tracking, no analytics, no cookies)
- XSS protection with DOMPurify

# Project Structure
- src/: Application source (index.html, styles.css, app.js, assets/)
- docs/: Documentation (ARCHITECTURE.md, QUICKSTART.md, SECURITY.md, BRANDING_GUIDELINE.md)
- .github/workflows/: CI/CD (ci.yml, security.yml, release.yml)
- dist/: Production build output

# Documentation
Main docs: README.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/QUICKSTART.md, docs/SECURITY.md
